---
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

```{r setup}
library(tidyverse)
library(reactable)
library(htmltools)
library(lubridate)

# ---- データ読み込み ----
final_ratings <- read_csv("../data_out/ratings/final_ratings.csv",
                           show_col_types = FALSE) |>
  mutate(date = as.Date(date))

rating_hist <- read_csv("../data_out/ratings/rating_history.csv",
                         show_col_types = FALSE) |>
  mutate(date = as.Date(date))

game_results <- read_csv("../data_out/ratings/game_results_with_ratings.csv",
                          show_col_types = FALSE) |>
  mutate(gamedate = as.Date(gamedate))

teams_info <- readxl::read_excel("../data_out/teamdata.xlsx") |>
  mutate(
    c1 = paste0("#", ColorCode1),
    c2 = paste0("#", if_else(is.na(ColorCode2), ColorCode1, ColorCode2)),
    c3 = paste0("#", if_else(is.na(ColorCode3),
                             if_else(is.na(ColorCode2), ColorCode1, ColorCode2),
                             ColorCode3))
  )

# ASCII スラグ（日本語ファイル名はGitHub Pagesで正しくURLマッピングされないため）
TEAM_SLUG <- c(
  "東大"   = "todai",  "明治" = "meiji", "慶應"   = "keio",
  "早稲田" = "waseda", "立教" = "rikkyo", "法政"  = "hosei"
)
LEAGUE_SLUG <- c("東京六大学" = "tokyo6")

# ---- 直近3試合の勝敗 ----
form_raw <- bind_rows(
  game_results |> transmute(gamedate, team = team1,
                             own = score1, opp = score2),
  game_results |> transmute(gamedate, team = team2,
                             own = score2, opp = score1)
) |>
  arrange(team, desc(gamedate)) |>
  group_by(team) |>
  slice_head(n = 3) |>
  mutate(res = case_when(own > opp ~ "W", own < opp ~ "L", TRUE ~ "D")) |>
  summarise(form = paste(res, collapse = ""), .groups = "drop")

# ---- ランク変動: 直前の試合日との比較 ----
latest_date    <- max(game_results$gamedate)
prev_game_date <- game_results |>
  filter(gamedate < latest_date) |> pull(gamedate) |> max()

prev_ranks <- rating_hist |>
  filter(date <= prev_game_date) |>
  group_by(team) |> slice_tail(n = 1) |> ungroup() |>
  arrange(desc(display_rating)) |>
  mutate(prev_rank = row_number()) |>
  select(team, prev_rank)

# ---- 直近試合日 ----
last_game_dates <- bind_rows(
  game_results |> transmute(team = team1, gamedate),
  game_results |> transmute(team = team2, gamedate)
) |>
  group_by(team) |>
  slice_max(gamedate, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) |>
  ungroup() |>
  rename(last_gamedate = gamedate)

# ---- ランキングテーブル構築 ----
rank_tbl <- final_ratings |>
  left_join(teams_info |> select(TeamShortName, TeamName, LeagueName, c1, c2, c3),
            by = c("team" = "TeamShortName")) |>
  left_join(form_raw,        by = "team") |>
  left_join(prev_ranks,      by = "team") |>
  left_join(last_game_dates, by = "team") |>
  mutate(
    rank_change = if_else(is.na(prev_rank), NA_integer_,
                          as.integer(prev_rank - rank))
  ) |>
  arrange(rank)

today_date <- Sys.Date()
today_games <- game_results |> filter(gamedate == today_date)
if (nrow(today_games) == 0) {
  today_games <- game_results |>
    filter(gamedate >= today_date - 7, gamedate < today_date) |>
    arrange(desc(gamedate))
  today_label <- "直近の試合"
} else {
  today_label <- paste0("本日の試合 (", format(today_date, "%Y年%m月%d日"), ")")
}
current_year <- max(year(game_results$gamedate[game_results$gamedate <= Sys.Date()]))

# ゲーム時レート → 偏差値スケール変換
global_mean <- mean(rating_hist$rating)
global_sd   <- sd(rating_hist$rating)
to_disp <- function(r) round(50 + 10 * (r - global_mean) / global_sd, 1)
```

## 大学ランキング

```{r university-ranking}
# 勝敗フォーム描画ヘルパー
form_html <- function(form_str) {
  if (is.na(form_str) || form_str == "") return(tags$span())
  chars <- strsplit(form_str, "")[[1]]
  tagList(lapply(chars, function(ch) {
    cls <- switch(ch, W = "form-w", L = "form-l", "form-d")
    sym <- switch(ch, W = "\u25cb", L = "\u25cf", "\u25b3")
    tags$span(class = paste("form-result", cls), sym, " ")
  }))
}

# ランク変動描画ヘルパー
change_html <- function(v) {
  if (is.na(v))   return(tags$span(class = "change-new",  "NEW"))
  if (v == 0)     return(tags$span(class = "change-none", "\u2014"))
  if (v > 0)      return(tags$span(class = "change-up",   paste0("\u25b2", v)))
  tags$span(class = "change-down", paste0("\u25bc", abs(v)))
}

reactable(
  rank_tbl,
  highlight  = TRUE,
  pagination = FALSE,
  columns = list(
    rank = colDef(
      name   = "順位",
      width  = 58,
      align  = "center",
      cell   = function(v) tags$span(class = "rank-number", v)
    ),
    TeamName = colDef(
      name  = "チーム",
      minWidth = 140,
      cell  = function(v, ri) {
        row <- rank_tbl[ri, ]
        tags$div(
          class = "team-name-cell",
          tags$div(class = "team-color-bar",
                   style = paste0("background:", row$c1)),
          tags$a(
            href  = paste0("university/", TEAM_SLUG[row$team], ".html"),
            class = "team-name-link",
            style = paste0("color:", row$c1),
            v
          )
        )
      }
    ),
    LeagueName = colDef(
      name  = "リーグ",
      cell  = function(v) {
        if (is.na(v)) return(tags$span())
        tags$a(
          href  = paste0("league/", LEAGUE_SLUG[v], ".html"),
          style = "text-decoration:none; font-size:0.82rem; color:#6B6B6B;",
          v
        )
      }
    ),
    display_rating = colDef(
      name  = "レート",
      width = 90,
      align = "right",
      cell  = function(v) tags$span(class = "rating-number", sprintf("%.1f", v))
    ),
    rank_change = colDef(
      name  = "変動",
      width = 68,
      align = "center",
      cell  = function(v) change_html(v)
    ),
    form = colDef(
      name    = "直近3試合",
      width   = 100,
      align   = "center",
      cell    = function(v) tags$div(class = "form-cell",
                                     style = "justify-content:center",
                                     form_html(v))
    ),
    last_gamedate = colDef(
      name   = "直近試合日",
      width  = 120,
      align  = "right",
      format = colFormat(date = TRUE, locales = "ja-JP")
    ),
    # 非表示列
    team = colDef(show = FALSE), date = colDef(show = FALSE),
    rating = colDef(show = FALSE),
    c1 = colDef(show = FALSE), c2 = colDef(show = FALSE),
    c3 = colDef(show = FALSE), prev_rank = colDef(show = FALSE)
  )
)
```

## シーズン終了時ランキング

```{r season-ranking}
# 全シーズン終了時点でのレーティングランキング（2001年以降）
season_ends <- game_results |>
  group_by(yr_val = year(gamedate), season) |>
  summarise(end_date = max(gamedate), .groups = "drop") |>
  filter(end_date <= Sys.Date(), yr_val >= 2001) |>
  arrange(desc(yr_val), desc(season == "秋"))

season_rank_data <- season_ends |>
  mutate(season_label = paste0(yr_val, " ", season)) |>
  mutate(ratings = map(end_date, function(d) {
    rating_hist |>
      filter(date <= d) |>
      group_by(team) |>
      slice_tail(n = 1) |>
      ungroup() |>
      select(team, display_rating)
  })) |>
  unnest(ratings) |>
  left_join(teams_info |> select(TeamShortName, TeamName, LeagueName, c1),
            by = c("team" = "TeamShortName")) |>
  filter(!is.na(TeamName)) |>
  group_by(season_label) |>
  mutate(s_rank = rank(desc(display_rating), ties.method = "min")) |>
  ungroup() |>
  arrange(desc(yr_val), desc(season == "秋"), s_rank) |>
  mutate(display_rating = round(display_rating, 1)) |>
  select(season_label, s_rank, team, TeamName, LeagueName, c1, display_rating)

season_default <- season_rank_data$season_label[1]

tagList(
  reactable(
    season_rank_data,
    filterable      = TRUE,
    defaultPageSize = 10,
    highlight       = TRUE,
    columns = list(
      season_label = colDef(
        name  = "シーズン",
        width = 100,
        align = "center",
        filterMethod = JS("(rows, columnId, filterValue) => {
          if (!filterValue) return rows;
          return rows.filter(row => String(row.values[columnId]) === filterValue);
        }"),
        filterInput = function(values, name) {
          opts <- unique(values)
          tags$select(
            style    = "font-size:0.85rem; padding:4px 8px; margin-bottom:4px;",
            onchange = sprintf(
              "Reactable.setFilter('season-ranking', '%s', event.target.value || undefined)", name
            ),
            lapply(opts, function(o) {
              opt <- tags$option(value = o, o)
              if (o == season_default) tagAppendAttributes(opt, selected = NA) else opt
            })
          )
        }
      ),
      s_rank = colDef(
        name  = "順位",
        width = 58,
        align = "center",
        cell  = function(v) tags$span(class = "rank-number", v)
      ),
      TeamName = colDef(
        name     = "チーム",
        minWidth = 140,
        cell     = function(v, ri) {
          row <- season_rank_data[ri, ]
          tags$div(
            class = "team-name-cell",
            tags$div(class = "team-color-bar", style = paste0("background:", row$c1)),
            tags$a(
              href  = paste0("university/", TEAM_SLUG[row$team], ".html"),
              class = "team-name-link",
              style = paste0("color:", row$c1),
              v
            )
          )
        }
      ),
      LeagueName = colDef(
        name = "リーグ",
        cell = function(v) {
          if (is.na(v)) return(tags$span())
          tags$a(href  = paste0("league/", LEAGUE_SLUG[v], ".html"),
                 style = "text-decoration:none; font-size:0.82rem; color:#6B6B6B;", v)
        }
      ),
      display_rating = colDef(
        name  = "レート",
        width = 90,
        align = "right",
        cell  = function(v) tags$span(class = "rating-number", sprintf("%.1f", v))
      ),
      c1   = colDef(show = FALSE),
      team = colDef(show = FALSE)
    ),
    elementId = "season-ranking"
  ),
  tags$script(HTML(sprintf(
    '(function poll(){if(window.Reactable){Reactable.setFilter("season-ranking","season_label","%s");}else{setTimeout(poll,50);}})();',
    season_default
  )))
)
```

## リーグランキング

```{r league-ranking}
league_rank <- rank_tbl |>
  group_by(LeagueName) |>
  summarise(
    avg_rating = round(mean(display_rating), 1),
    n_teams    = n(),
    .groups    = "drop"
  ) |>
  filter(!is.na(LeagueName)) |>
  arrange(desc(avg_rating)) |>
  mutate(league_rank = row_number())

reactable(
  league_rank,
  highlight  = TRUE,
  pagination = FALSE,
  columns = list(
    league_rank = colDef(name = "順位", width = 58, align = "center",
                         cell = function(v) tags$span(class = "rank-number", v)),
    LeagueName  = colDef(
      name = "リーグ",
      cell = function(v) {
        tags$a(href  = paste0("league/", LEAGUE_SLUG[v], ".html"),
               style = "text-decoration:none; font-weight:700; color:#111;", v)
      }
    ),
    avg_rating = colDef(name = "平均レート", width = 110, align = "right",
                        cell = function(v) tags$span(class = "rating-number",
                                                     sprintf("%.1f", v))),
    n_teams    = colDef(name = "チーム数",   width = 90, align = "right")
  )
)
```

## 注目試合

```{r highlight-games}
#| output: asis

if (nrow(today_games) > 0) {
  top_game   <- today_games |>
    mutate(total = r1_before + r2_before) |> arrange(desc(total)) |> slice(1)
  y_actual   <- if_else(today_games$score1 > today_games$score2, 1,
                        if_else(today_games$score1 < today_games$score2, 0, 0.5))
  upset_game <- today_games |>
    mutate(surprise = abs(y_actual - E1)) |> arrange(desc(surprise)) |> slice(1)

  make_card <- function(label, g) {
    info1 <- teams_info |> filter(TeamShortName == g$team1) |> slice(1)
    info2 <- teams_info |> filter(TeamShortName == g$team2) |> slice(1)
    t1n  <- if (nrow(info1) > 0) info1$TeamName else g$team1
    t2n  <- if (nrow(info2) > 0) info2$TeamName else g$team2
    col1 <- if (nrow(info1) > 0) info1$c1 else "#111111"
    col2 <- if (nrow(info2) > 0) info2$c1 else "#111111"
    d1   <- to_disp(g$r1_before)
    d2   <- to_disp(g$r2_before)
    w1   <- g$score1 > g$score2
    cls1 <- if (isTRUE(w1)) "score-win" else "score-lose"
    cls2 <- if (!isTRUE(w1)) "score-win" else "score-lose"
    glue::glue(
      '<div class="highlight-card">',
      '<div class="highlight-label">{label}</div>',
      '<div class="highlight-matchup">',
      '<a href="university/{TEAM_SLUG[g$team1]}.html" style="font-weight:700;text-decoration:none;color:{col1}">{t1n}</a>',
      '<span class="rating-badge">({d1})</span>',
      '<span class="{cls1}">{g$score1}</span>',
      '<span style="color:#CCC">-</span>',
      '<span class="{cls2}">{g$score2}</span>',
      '<a href="university/{TEAM_SLUG[g$team2]}.html" style="font-weight:700;text-decoration:none;color:{col2}">{t2n}</a>',
      '<span class="rating-badge">({d2})</span>',
      '</div>',
      '<div class="highlight-meta">{format(g$gamedate,"%Y/%m/%d")} &middot; {g$gametype}</div>',
      '</div>'
    )
  }

  cat('<div class="highlight-grid">\n')
  cat(make_card("最もレベルの高い試合", top_game))
  cat(make_card("最大の番狂わせ",       upset_game))
  cat('</div>\n')
} else {
  cat('<p style="color:#AAA;font-size:0.85rem;font-style:italic;">本日の試合データはありません。</p>\n')
}
```

## `r today_label`

```{r today-games-table}
#| output: asis

if (nrow(today_games) > 0) {
  gms <- today_games |> arrange(desc(gamedate))
  cat('<div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:1px;background:#E8E8E8;border:1px solid #E8E8E8;">\n')
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(gms))) {
    g    <- gms[i, ]
    inf1 <- teams_info |> filter(TeamShortName == g$team1) |> slice(1)
    inf2 <- teams_info |> filter(TeamShortName == g$team2) |> slice(1)
    n1   <- if (nrow(inf1) > 0) inf1$TeamName else g$team1
    n2   <- if (nrow(inf2) > 0) inf2$TeamName else g$team2
    c1_  <- if (nrow(inf1) > 0) inf1$c1 else "#111111"
    c2_  <- if (nrow(inf2) > 0) inf2$c1 else "#111111"
    d1   <- to_disp(g$r1_before)
    d2   <- to_disp(g$r2_before)
    w1   <- !is.na(g$score1) && !is.na(g$score2) && g$score1 > g$score2
    w2   <- !is.na(g$score1) && !is.na(g$score2) && g$score2 > g$score1
    cls1 <- if (isTRUE(w1)) "score-win" else "score-lose"
    cls2 <- if (isTRUE(w2)) "score-win" else "score-lose"
    cat(glue::glue(
      '<div class="highlight-card">',
      '<div class="highlight-meta">{format(as.Date(g$gamedate), "%Y/%m/%d")} &middot; {g$gametype}</div>',
      '<div class="highlight-matchup" style="margin-top:8px;">',
      '<a href="university/{TEAM_SLUG[g$team1]}.html" style="font-weight:700;text-decoration:none;color:{c1_}">{n1}</a>',
      '<span class="rating-badge">({d1})</span>',
      '<span class="{cls1}">{g$score1}</span>',
      '<span style="color:#CCC">-</span>',
      '<span class="{cls2}">{g$score2}</span>',
      '<a href="university/{TEAM_SLUG[g$team2]}.html" style="font-weight:700;text-decoration:none;color:{c2_}">{n2}</a>',
      '<span class="rating-badge">({d2})</span>',
      '</div>',
      '</div>\n'
    ))
  }
  cat('</div>\n')
} else {
  cat('<p style="color:#AAA; font-size:0.85rem; font-style:italic;">試合データが見つかりません。</p>\n')
}
```

<div class="back-links">
  <a href="methodology.html" class="back-link">&#8594; 計算方法の詳細</a>
</div>
